issue_title: when uploading avatar, storage server has error and new avatar not rendered on page
issue_body_preview:
when uploading a new avatar, the upload does succeed and the image is accessible
but the avatar on the page does not refresh to new value

<details>
<summary>prev error (fixed)</summary>
the storage server logs out an error
```
@uninbox/storage:dev: [nitro] [uncaughtException] TypeError [ERR_
test_description_zh: 上传新头像后，观察页面上的头像图片是否刷新为新上传的图片。具体步骤：1. 进入个人资料或头像设置页面；2. 点击上传头像，选择一张新图片并完成上传；3. 上传成功后，观察页面上显示的头像是否更新为刚刚上传的新图片。
expected_result_zh: 头像上传成功后，页面上的头像图片应自动刷新并显示为新上传的头像，无需手动刷新页面即可看到更新后的头像。
